title: Class Definition
description: Define a simple PHP class with properties and a constructor.
problemStatement:
Blueprint for objects! Create a class `Car` with a public property `$brand`. Add a `__construct($brand)` method that sets this property. 

**Requirement:** Use the `$this` keyword correctly.
hints: In PHP, `public` properties are accessible from outside the class.
expectedOutput: A class definition for Car with a constructor
